title: Complete a POS sale and view the receipt
description: This verifies a cashier can build a cart, choose checkout details, submit the order, and see the receipt modal after a successful sale.

steps.description: Navigate to the POS checkout screen
Add one or more products to the cart
Set the customer or order details required for checkout
Apply a discount if supported by the cart
Select a payment method
Select an order type
Submit the order
Verify a confirmation is shown
Verify the receipt modal opens

title: Inspect an order and update its status
description: This verifies a user can find an existing order, open its details, and change the status from pending to paid or canceled.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders screen
Open an existing pending order
Open the order details view
Change the order status
Verify the updated order status is shown
Verify the order details remain accessible

title: Update an order to paid
description: A user can change an existing order from pending to paid and see the updated status reflected in the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders management page
Open an order from the list
Change the order status to paid
Verify the updated status is reflected in the order view
Verify the order list shows the updated status badge

title: Browse recent orders
description: A user can open the orders view and see the most recent orders listed for review.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders management page
Verify the order list is displayed
Verify recent order entries are visible

title: Create a new menu item
description: This verifies staff can add a product with name, price, category, and description and see it appear in the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management screen
Open the create product form
Fill in the product name field with a unique item name
Fill in the price field with a valid value
Select a category
Fill in the description field with a short product description
Submit the product form
Verify the new product appears in the catalog

title: Manage the product catalog
description: A user can list products, add a new product, edit it, and remove an obsolete product from the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management page
Verify the product list is displayed
Create a new product
Open the newly created product for editing
Update the product details
Delete the product
Verify the product list is displayed without the deleted product

title: Inspect an order and its items
description: A user can open a specific order to review its details and item breakdown.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders management page
Open an order from the list
Verify the order detail view is displayed
Verify the order item list is displayed

title: Edit an existing menu item
description: This verifies staff can update an existing product’s pricing or details and see the changes reflected in the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management screen
Open an existing product for editing
Change the product name or details
Change the product price to a new valid value
Submit the changes
Verify the updated product is shown in the catalog

title: View today’s dashboard metrics
description: This verifies the dashboard loads today’s sales, order counts, and top products so operators can monitor store performance.

steps.description: Navigate to the dashboard
Verify today’s sales metrics are displayed
Verify today’s order counts and top-selling products are displayed

title: Update an order to canceled
description: A user can change an existing order status to canceled and see the updated status reflected in the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders management page
Open an order from the list
Change the order status to canceled
Verify the updated status is reflected in the order view
Verify the order list shows the updated status badge

title: View current business metrics on the dashboard
description: A user can open the dashboard and review today’s sales, order counts, and top-selling products.

steps.description: Navigate to the dashboard page
Verify today’s sales data is displayed
Verify order count metrics are displayed
Verify top-selling products are displayed

title: Delete an obsolete menu item
description: This verifies staff can remove an obsolete product and confirm it no longer appears in the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management screen
Create or select a product to remove
Open the delete action for that product
Confirm the deletion
Verify the product is removed from the catalog

title: View the product catalog
description: This verifies the product management screen lists existing products so staff can review the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management screen
Verify the product catalog is displayed
Verify existing products are listed

title: Review current order activity from the dashboard
description: This verifies a user can open the current order activity from the dashboard and reach order information for active operations.

steps.description: Navigate to the dashboard
Click the entry point for current order activity
Verify current order activity is displayed
Verify order details are accessible

title: Edit product details
description: A user can update an existing product’s pricing, category, and description and see the changes saved in the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management page
Open a product for editing
Update the product details
Verify the product list reflects the updated product information

title: Delete an obsolete product
description: A user can remove an obsolete product from the catalog and confirm it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management page
Open a product for editing
Delete the product
Verify the product no longer appears in the product list

title: View items inside an order
description: This verifies a user can drill into an order and see its line items for operational review.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders screen
Open an existing order
Open the item details for that order
Verify the order items are displayed
Verify item-level details are visible

title: Update business settings and continue using the app
description: This verifies settings changes for business name and backend URL can be saved and the app still loads operational data afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to the settings screen
Update the business name
Update the backend URL setting
Save the settings
Navigate back to the dashboard
Verify the updated business name is shown
Verify dashboard data still loads

title: Update business settings
description: A user can change business settings and see the updated configuration applied in the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to the settings page
Update the business name
Update the backend URL
Save the settings
Verify the updated settings are reflected in the interface

title: Create a product with incomplete details
description: This verifies the product form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management screen
Open the create product form
Fill in only part of the required product information
Submit the product form
Verify validation feedback is shown
Verify the product is not added to the catalog

title: Prevent checkout with invalid order totals
description: This verifies the POS blocks checkout when the order totals or items are invalid and shows checkout validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to the POS checkout screen
Add a product to the cart
Set checkout values that make the order invalid
Submit the order
Verify checkout validation feedback is shown
Verify the sale is not completed

title: Update a product that is no longer available
description: This verifies the product editor shows a not-found state when a user tries to update a product that cannot be found.

steps.description: Navigate to the product management screen
Create a new product to use for editing
Open the edit form for that product
Change the product details
Remove the product from the catalog
Submit the edit changes
Verify a not-found error state is shown

title: Show an order-not-found state
description: A user who opens a missing order sees a clear not-found state instead of an order detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders management page
Open an order that does not exist
Verify an order-not-found message is displayed

title: Show validation feedback for an invalid order status change
description: A user sees validation feedback when attempting to set an order to an unsupported status.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders management page
Open an order from the list
Attempt to change the order status to an invalid value
Verify a status validation error is displayed

title: Show settings validation for incomplete changes
description: A user sees validation feedback when trying to save incomplete settings.

steps.description: Navigate to the settings page
Clear a required settings field
Save the settings
Verify a settings validation error is displayed
